note: Public reference points. Coordinates verified via USGS (nwis) and OpenStreetMap Nominatim, not estimated. Add access points/ramps here as coordinates are confirmed; GeoJSON uses [lon, lat].

properties.name: South Holston Dam
properties.note: Top of the river. Overflow spillway + generation tubes; drive across the top. Source: OpenStreetMap.

properties.name: Weir dams / Osceola Island (below dam)
properties.note: Tailwater start below the dam — weir dams, aeration grids, footbridge, most-crowded reach. Source: USGS gauge 03476500 (below SH Dam).

properties.name: Island Park, Bluff City
properties.note: Bottom of the ~14.6 mi run, where the river enters Boone Lake. Deeper here — often floated. Source: OpenStreetMap.
